summary: Exact-HEAD implementation and verification materially close the earlier gate-evidence gaps: the public CLI E2E now creates the managed worktree, prepares a missing artifact, commits implementation and repair, persists decision and verification-stop resume paths, performs fresh independent review, and reaches current-HEAD final prepare while Codex implementation dispatch is locally contained. Gate Evidence cannot pass yet because the authoritative validation-sequencing artifact marks all five phases invalidated, all current-HEAD acceptance and judgment adjudications are still absent, and pr-prepare reports stale review/artifact consistency plus unresolved critical gates. Rebind the sequence, complete current-HEAD independent adjudication and reviews without waiver, regenerate pr-prepare, and rerun this strict final review.

findings.detail: The authoritative validation sequence marks targeted_validation, preflight_review, code_frozen, expensive_verification, and final_review all status=invalidated, leaves frozen_binding=null, and gate:validation_sequencing reports every phase incomplete. This remains true even though the phase entries and proposed binding name exact HEAD 56d69700, which means standalone exact-HEAD QA files cannot establish the required ordered freeze/verify/review lifecycle. Re-record or repair the sequence so the same frozen binding advances through all five phases, then regenerate pr-prepare.

gate:evidence_adjudication reports 0/8 fresh AC verdicts and gate:judgment_dag_adjudication reports 0/16 fresh judgment verdicts at 56d69700. The ledgers contain older e6446920 and 3da7bb24 verdicts, including superseded not_demonstrated findings, but adjudication is strict current-HEAD and fail-closed. Dispatch fresh independent adjudicators after the review surface is frozen and record all AC and judgment items at 56d69700; do not treat the older verdicts or generated prepare requests as current proof.

Current pr-prepare is overall needs_verification with ready_for_pr_create=false and nine critical unresolved gates. gate:artifact_consistency reports eight stale or unverified review/verification artifacts; gate_evidence and release_risk lifecycles are still running, while spec_consistency, code_spec_alignment, and product_requirement records have HEAD mismatch. Close and record the current gate reviewers, refresh the stale required review roles as directed, rerun pr-prepare, and verify artifact_consistency plus Agent Review clear on the same clean HEAD.

The generated split plan is split_recommended across requirements-ssot, runtime-behavior, e2e-gate, and misc-follow-up, while responsibility_authority, common_judgment_spine, data_state, execution_topology, and senior-gap gates remain unresolved. This is not a code defect in the reviewed runtime contract, but a final Gate pass would ignore the machine-readable adjudication boundary. Either follow the split recommendation or record an explicit accepted non-split decision with the required owner/evidence; no waiver is currently recorded.

inspection.summary: Inspected clean exact HEAD, the gate review request, Story/Architecture/Spec/topology replay, changed runtime and E2E code, exact-HEAD verification/conformance/review artifacts, validation sequence, review lifecycle, adjudication ledgers, split/decision/senior-gap outputs, and current pr-prepare; reran the focused runtime, connector, review-orchestration, closure, and E2E tests successfully and verified the installed Codex CLI supports the generated containment flags.

judgment_delta: Initial expectation: exact-HEAD command artifacts might be enough to pass Gate Evidence -> Final decision: needs_changes because the authoritative sequence is invalidated, exact-HEAD adjudication is absent, artifact consistency is stale, required gate reviews remain running or stale, and no waiver exists.
